message:
🐛 Add fork guards to nightly workflow schedules (#2305)

* 🐛 Add fork guards to nightly workflow schedules

All three nightly workflows (test-suite, compliance, dashboard-health)
run on forks where they waste CI minutes and fail due to missing
secrets. Add `if: github.repository == 'kubestellar/console'` guard
to the first job in each workflow.

Fixes #2194

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Add fork guard to report job in nightly-compliance

Address Copilot review: the report job used if: always() which
would still run on forks even when upstream jobs were skipped.
Added repository check to prevent fork runs.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Add fork guards to all nightly-compliance jobs

Address Copilot review: add `if: github.repository == 'kubestellar/console'`
to the compliance and perf matrix jobs, not just build and report. This
ensures no jobs run on forks even if dependency skip behavior changes.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,6 +31,7 @@ permissions:
 
 jobs:
   build:
+    if: github.repository == 'kubestellar/console'
     name: Build
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     defaults:
@@ -62,6 +63,7 @@ jobs:
   # ── Compliance Suites ────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
   compliance:
+    if: github.repository == 'kubestellar/console'
     name: Compliance (${{ matrix.suite }})
     needs: build
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
@@ -190,6 +192,7 @@ jobs:
   # ── Performance Suites ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 
   perf:
+    if: github.repository == 'kubestellar/console'
     name: Perf (${{ matrix.suite }})
     needs: build
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
@@ -315,7 +318,7 @@ jobs:
   report:
     name: Report & Create Issues
     needs: [compliance, perf]
-    if: always()
+    if: always() && github.repository == 'kubestellar/console'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4

@@ -33,6 +33,7 @@ concurrency:
 
 jobs:
   health-check:
+    if: github.repository == 'kubestellar/console'
     name: Dashboard Health Check
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 20

@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@ env:
 
 jobs:
   test:
+    if: github.repository == 'kubestellar/console'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 90
     steps:
